name: procedural_memory_write
description: Code should include a procedural memory write operation inside a clocked always block, where a memory element is assigned synchronously using non-blocking assignment.
snippet: always @(posedge clk) begin if (en) ram[addr] <= data; end

name: procedural_memory_read
description: Code should include a procedural memory read operation inside a clocked always block, where a memory element is read synchronously.
snippet: always @(posedge clk) begin data_out <= ram[addr]; end

name: async_reset_in_clock_block
description: Code should include an asynchronous reset condition inside a clocked always block, where reset is checked alongside the clock edge.
snippet: always @(posedge clk or posedge reset) begin if (reset) q <= 0; else q <= d; end
